spus.prompt_text: Create a 9:16 TikTok ecommerce product video segment inspired by the uploaded bag reference video. Show a premium structured handbag as the hero product, with smooth handheld push-in, zipper and stitching close-ups, clean product handling, a brief styling moment, and boutique lighting. Keep the bag centered and desirable, no text overlay, no visible brand logo, realistic materials, polished social commerce look.

visual_constraints.camera: smooth handheld push-in, detail close-ups, elegant product handling

spus.negative_prompt_text: blurry, warped bag shape, broken zipper, extra straps, fake logos, watermark, captions, text overlay, low quality, distorted hands

vbus.script_text: This is the everyday bag that makes your outfit look instantly polished. Clean structure, practical space, and premium details made for workdays, weekends, and everything in between.

sequences.persuasive_goal: Make the handbag feel premium, versatile, and worth clicking within the first seconds.

notes: case-002 regression payload frozen from current workspace.
reference.structural_goal: Replicate the ecommerce bag video skeleton while swapping in new prompt/copy details.
